title: EarthCrack SMP
description: A modpack for the EarthCrack modded SMP
body:
![mr](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/ecr?color=the%20not%20found%20color%20looks%20very%20cool&label=modrinth&style=for-the-badge) ![ds](https://img.shields.io/discord/1003260261123244113?color=5865F2&label=DIscord&style=for-the-badge)

The modpack to play on the EarthCrack modded SMP (The IP is **193.123.71.216:8123**). Uploaded here for publicity and convenience.

---

### Required mods

- Immersive Portals

- Origins

- Pehkui

---

For your convenience some compatible optimization mods are also included! 

[![SO](https://github.com/intergrav/devins-badges/blob/v3/assets/compact/built-with/simply-optimized_46h.png?raw=true)](https://modrinth.com/modpack/sop)

...and a few non-essential, but also welcome mods too!

![ecrp](https://i.imgur.com/ZvEPxWH.png)
